# hush_gcp_integration (Data Source)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Hush Security GCP integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_gcp_integration" "example" {
  name = "my-gcp-integration"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the GCP integration
- `name` (String) The name of the GCP integration

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the GCP integration
- `features` (List of Object) List of GCP features to enable (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features))
- `projects` (List of Object) List of GCP projects to scan (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))
- `service_account_email` (String) The GCP service account email for Hush to impersonate. Required to complete the integration.
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration

<a id="nestedatt--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `state_message` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `organization_id` (String)
- `project_id` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `state_message` (String)
